## Game Pack Submission

- [ ] Game is fun in under 3 minutes
- [ ] Deterministic rules
- [ ] Human playable
- [ ] Agent playable
- [ ] Replay proof works
- [ ] Mobile UI works
- [ ] License included
- [ ] No trademark/IP misuse
- [ ] No secrets
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Example replay included
